name: Workshop Medium
description: Figures working in a shared space — the bustle of productive hands.
hld_patterns: {setting}. Medium shot of a workshop, multiple figures each absorbed in their own task.
{setting}. A busy workshop floor, hands and tools in coordinated motion.
{setting}. Mid-range view of laborers at their stations, the air thick with industry.

2: {subject}, left third of frame, facing right.
{subject}, right third of frame, facing left.
3: {subject}, far left of frame, facing right.
{subject}, far right of frame, facing left.
4: {subject}, far left of frame, facing right.
{subject}, far right of frame, facing left.

background_pool: Spacious workshop with wooden workbenches, shelves of tools, and shafts of dusty light from high windows
Open-plan craft hall with multiple workstations, raw materials stacked along the walls, sawdust on the floor
Industrial workshop with overhead beams, hanging lamp chains, and work surfaces cluttered with hand tools
action_pool: arms moving in steady rhythmic repetition
bent at the waist, both hands engaged in front of them
shoulders rotating as they work something with both hands
head down, gaze fixed on their own work
one arm extended, the other drawn back
leaning forward, weight on the front foot
hands clasped around an object, fingers spread wide
torso twisted slightly, reaching across their body
upper body swaying with controlled momentum
jaw set, brow furrowed, eyes tracking their own hands
